query:
SELECT id, name, slug FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%Franco FR-50%' OR name LIKE '%franco fr-50%' LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, name, slug FROM products WHERE slug LIKE '%franco%' LIMIT 15;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3qoidv3y2UAwFYa.059d504460e8 --database YYAoWxTvDsxnrHQtNTJgbZ --execute SELECT id, name, slug FROM products WHERE name LIKE '%Franco FR-50%' OR name LIKE '%franco fr-50%' LIMIT 5;
SELECT id, name, slug FROM products WHERE slug LIKE '%franco%' LIMIT 15;
